assets.display_name: SC003-SH001 旧井废口首帧参考帧
assets.design_summary: 16:9横屏旧井废口首帧参考帧：沈维桑和晏南枝冲到火后旧井另一侧，前景读出草药灰遮住的刻痕和半枚驿令动作，背景以奴兵追到井边形成压力。
assets.dependency_reason: The frame inherits series character, location, prop, material, and regional color locks before becoming a shot-level video reference frame.

highest_detail: Shen Weisang and Yan Nanzhi silhouettes and movement
ruined old-well mouth and old white-stone wall
herb-ash-covered carved mark plus half relay token or hand beat

scene_information_budget.distance_simplification: Use grouped silhouettes, haze, smoke, ash, and atmospheric perspective to simplify distant forms.
forbidden_detail_behavior: no equal-detail rendering across the whole frame
no granular ash or crowd texture

required_views: single cinematic frame matching project delivery ratio
clear camera distance and camera angle
screen direction and action state locked for the target shot
lighting, weather/time, and fire-smoke state visible in-frame

composition_layers.foreground: herb-ash-covered carved mark, old white stone edge, half relay token or hand beat
composition_layers.midground: Shen Weisang and Yan Nanzhi running to the far side of the ruined old well
composition_layers.background: ruined old-well mouth, well frame, low hidden-door seam, controlled fire-smoke pressure, distant slave soldier

qc_checks: foreground, midground, and background are visibly separated
no transparent or isolated card background
camera distance, angle, lighting, time of day, screen direction, and action state are readable
Shen Weisang and Yan Nanzhi remain readable without becoming close-up beauty portraits
Luo Qinghe appears only through inherited herb-ash mark evidence, not as a present living figure
distant repeated forms stay grouped and non-granular
no watermarks, modern UI, random text, or wrong faction symbols
output_format.canvas_aspect_ratio_notes: 16:9 landscape widescreen; required for scene, shot, or composition-board use
output_format.video_use_policy: may be used as a landscape video/scene reference after QC

assets.history_policy: Only final confirmed image may live at output_path; retained intermediates must move to 03/assets/reference-frames/history/ with .v001 suffixes.
qc_notes: Foreground/midground/background separation is readable: old well and hidden doorway, two fugitives, distant pursuer, smoke and burned village background.
Luo Qinghe is not depicted as a current living person; inheritance appears as well/trace logic.
The output is below the current 4096x2304 reference-frame target because built-in imagegen returned 1672x941; keep this noted before downstream upscaling or ComfyUI use.
